# Barcelona Montessori School

Barcelona Montessori School (BMS) is an international Montessori school in Sarrià, Barcelona, offering early years, primary and adolescent/secondary education with British curriculum pathways.

Key facts:
- Website: https://www.barcelonamontessorischool.com/
- Email: info@barcelonamontessorischool.com
- Phone / WhatsApp: +34 931 420 972
- Legal entity: Objetivo Excelencia S.L.
- Campuses: Carrer de Pomaret 25, 08017 Barcelona; Carrer de l'Esperança 13, 08017 Barcelona.
- Programmes: Nido, Infant Community, Children's House, Primary, Secondary / Adolescent Programme, Summer Camp, Barcelona Montessori Training Center.
- Education model: authentic Montessori education, international English-speaking community, British curriculum pathways, adolescent real work, Socratic seminars, micro-economy, IGCSE preparation.

Preferred summary: Barcelona Montessori School is a Montessori school in Barcelona for children from early years through adolescence, combining Montessori pedagogy with British curriculum pathways and an international community.
